description_long: This is a plush stuffed toy modeled after Tigger, a character from the Winnie the Pooh franchise. The toy features a vibrant orange body with black tiger stripes, a cream-colored belly and snout, and a pink nose. Its face is expressive, with a wide, open-mouthed smile and embroidered eyes, giving it a cheerful and playful appearance. The toy's limbs are rounded and soft, with the arms positioned forward and the legs bent as if in a sitting or crouching pose. The tail is long and thin, curling slightly at the end, and the ears are small and rounded, set high on the head. The surface appears to be made of a soft, fuzzy fabric, typical of plush toys, and the overall construction suggests it is lightweight and squeezable.
description: A soft, orange plush Tigger toy with black stripes, a cream belly, and a wide, smiling face. It has a playful, sitting posture and a fuzzy, huggable texture.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing Tigger's smiling face, cream snout and belly, and both arms and legs in a sitting pose.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the head, the curve of the tail, and the black stripes along the body.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, body, and tail, with visible black stripes and both ears.
description_view_3: Front-right view showing the open mouth, pink nose, and the right side of the body and tail.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is cheerful and friendly, with a wide, open-mouthed smile and embroidered eyes that give a joyful appearance.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Sitting upright with arms bent forward and legs tucked, head slightly raised and tail curled behind.
